justification: All 4 bracket boundaries correct: 9999<10000 split (AC1/AC2), 50000/50001 split (AC4/AC5 — 50000 returns 10% via <=50000 guard), 150000/150001 split (AC7/AC6 — 150000 returns 25% via <=150000 guard). AC8 validation present with 3 test cases (0, -1, -999999). Tests explicitly cover all 9 boundary values: 9999, 10000, 10001, 50001, 50000, 30000, 100000, 150000, 150001 plus additional edge cases. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs with correct status and test references.

observations.text: Guard order (<=0, <10k, <=50k, <=150k, else) correctly implements all inclusive/exclusive boundary requirements
The hardest boundary (50000 → 10% not 25%) is explicitly tested and correct
AC8 covers zero, negative, and large negative values
Missing explicit test for 49999 and 149999 — only 9999 tested on the just-below side; mid-bracket values used instead for some brackets
